productDisplayName: Spykar Men Ranger Black N Red Stripe White Shirts
description: Composition White shirt with red and navy blue vertical stripes, made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves, full front buttoned placket and collar, brand logo embroidered on the left chest, with a curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Red and navy blue on a base of white is a classic combination that adds immense style to your casual look. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt from spykar. Pair it with denims or corduroys and black footwear to look like the king of casual wear.
